name: @ickb/bot-cli
description: CCC-native iCKB order fulfillment and rebalance bot
author: phroi

scripts.start: [ -n "$BOT_CONFIG_FILE" ] || { echo 'BOT_CONFIG_FILE not set' >&2; exit 1; }; bash -o pipefail -c 'node src/index.ts | tee "log_$(date +%F_%H-%M-%S).json"'
scripts.start:loop: while true; do pnpm start; status=$?; [ "$status" -ne 0 ] || exit 0; [ "$status" -ne 2 ] || exit 2; sleep 10; done
